# FloridaHomeOffer

## Summary
FloridaHomeOffer helps property owners sell any type of real estate fast for cash - residential homes, commercial buildings, vacant land, multi-family properties, mobile homes, farms, industrial buildings, retail properties, and mixed-use buildings. We serve all 67 Florida counties and provide free, no-obligation cash offers within 24 hours. No agents, no fees, no repairs required. We buy properties in any condition and can close in as little as 7 days.

## Company
- Name: FloridaHomeOffer (WETYR Corp)
- Founder: Mark Gabrielli
- Service Area: All of Florida (67 counties, 50+ cities) plus nationwide
- Contact: (321) 555-0199

## Primary Topics
- Selling a home or property fast for cash in Florida
- Cash offers for residential, commercial, and land properties
- Selling without a real estate agent (FSBO alternatives)
- Selling property as-is in any condition
- Florida real estate laws, closing costs, and timelines
- FSBO vs cash buyer vs real estate agent comparison
- Property types: residential, commercial, land, multi-family, mobile homes, industrial, retail, farm, mixed-use
- Special situations: divorce, inherited property, foreclosure, tax liens, code violations, probate, tenant issues

## Property Types We Buy
- Single-family homes
- Condominiums and townhouses
- Multi-family properties (duplexes to apartment complexes)
- Commercial properties (office, retail, medical, restaurant)
- Vacant land (residential lots, commercial parcels, agricultural acreage)
- Mobile and manufactured homes
- Industrial properties (warehouses, factories, flex space)
- Farm and ranch properties
- Mixed-use buildings
- Retail storefronts and shopping centers
